prompt: Using the cinema seat selection interface mockup, design an airline seat-selection modal with seat map and price tiers.
prompt_refined: Generate a user interface image of an airline seat-selection modal. The modal should centrally display an airline seat map. This seat map should adapt the visual style and seat representation (e.g., small, colored square-like shapes for seats, row numbers on the side) from image 1, reconfiguring it for a typical airplane cabin layout with distinct aisles and various seating sections. Position a section with clearly labeled price tiers (e.g., 'Standard Economy', 'Premium Economy', 'Business Class') and their corresponding prices to the right of the seat map, or below it as a legend. The entire modal should have a clean, dark-themed, and organized appearance, mirroring the aesthetic of image 1.
objects: Row numbers on the side of the seat map
Distinct aisles within the seat map
Various seating sections within the seat map
Price tiers section (to the right of the seat map, or below it)
Labeled price tiers (e.g., 'Standard Economy', 'Premium Economy', 'Business Class')
